Cuts.prompt: Opening wide shot: morning light pours through the warehouse windows, dust motes drifting in the beams.
Camera dollies in on a workbench littered with brass gears and a half-assembled clockwork bird.
Close-up: gloved hands click the final escapement into place. The bird's eyes flicker open.
The bird tilts its head, ruffles brass feathers, and takes flight across the workshop.
Final beat: silhouette against the sunlit window, frozen mid-flight. Cut to black.
